MyTutor browser activities

Games for live lessons

These activities are designed to be opened directly in a browser during lessons. They are lightweight, local-first, and built to create quick bursts of retrieval, discussion, and competition without needing a login or a build step.

Chemistry IBDP Bonding

Bonding Arcade

Students classify substances by structure, predict key properties, and build a score streak. It works well as a five-minute retrieval warm-up or a short competitive break inside a longer lesson.

Open game
Chemistry IBDP VSEPR

VSEPR Studio

Generate molecular geometry diagrams from steric number and lone-pair count, or jump to common molecules such as NH3, H2O, SF4, and XeF4.

Open tool
Open these files directly from Finder or run a simple local server if you prefer. For example: python3 -m http.server from the repository root, then visit http://localhost:8000/games/.
